description: User configuration for Follow Builders skill. Stored at ~/.follow-builders/config.json

platform.description: Detected platform: openclaw or other (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)

timezone.description: IANA timezone string for scheduling (e.g. America/New_York, Asia/Shanghai)

frequency.description: How often to deliver the digest

deliveryTime.description: Time of day to deliver digest in HH:MM format (24-hour)

weeklyDay.description: Day of week for weekly digests (only used when frequency is weekly)

delivery.description: How the digest is delivered to the user

method.description: Delivery method: stdout (terminal/agent), telegram (bot message), email (via Resend)

chatId.description: Telegram chat ID (only for telegram method)

email.description: Email address to send digest to (only for email method)

cron.description: How scheduled digest jobs run in non-persistent environments

mode.description: Cron mode: raw pipes prepare-digest.js to deliver.js, llm remixes through an agent before delivery

agent.description: Agent runtime for LLM cron mode. Only codex is supported

fallbackToRaw.description: Whether LLM cron failures may fall back to raw delivery. The runner does not send raw output unless this is explicitly handled by a future mode

codexProfile.description: Optional Codex config profile to use for LLM cron runs

codexSandbox.description: Codex sandbox mode for LLM cron runs. Use danger-full-access only when the default sandbox blocks network access for prepare-digest.js

enabled.description: Whether daily runs should update the Univer workbook

workbookPath.description: Path to the user's long-lived .univer workbook

unitId.description: Remote Univer workbook unit id created by first sync

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user has completed initial setup
